mdSummary:
# Confetti

Burst of colored particles on demand via imperative Fire() method.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/confetti

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Confetti | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered inside the confetti container, positioned beneath the overlay \<canvas\> that the particles are drawn on. |
| Confetti | ParticleCount | `int` | `80` | Number of confetti particles to emit per burst. |
| Confetti | Spread | `int` | `70` | Spread angle in degrees. |
| Confetti | Colors | `string[]?` | `` | Colors to use for confetti. Defaults to a festive palette using CSS variables (resolved at runtime). |
| Confetti | OriginX | `double` | `0.5` | Origin X position (0–1, relative to element width). Default: 0.5 (center). |
| Confetti | OriginY | `double` | `0.5` | Origin Y position (0–1, relative to element height). Default: 0.5 (center). |
| Confetti | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the container div. |
| Confetti | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the container div. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Confetti) — Content rendered inside the confetti container, positioned beneath the overlay \<canvas\> that the particles are drawn on.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Confetti />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Confetti/Confetti.razor`
